message:
style(runtime): update eviction docstring and reformat reconciler test constructors

- Update TrustState::insert() docstring from "oldest record (by key)"
  to "lowest-precedence record" to match the precedence_cmp()-based
  eviction logic introduced in the previous commit
- Reformat AntiEntropyReconciler::new() calls across 7 tests to wrap
  long lines per project rustfmt settings

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
